RimHeroes.GestralJobDef.label: porter
RimHeroes.GestralJobDef.description: A gestral hauler. Carries burdens so its master never has to.

RimHeroes.GestralJobDef.label: digger
RimHeroes.GestralJobDef.description: A gestral miner. Tunnels with unsettling enthusiasm.

RimHeroes.GestralJobDef.label: hearth
RimHeroes.GestralJobDef.description: A gestral cook. Keeps the pot full and the fire lit.

RimHeroes.GestralJobDef.label: sprout
RimHeroes.GestralJobDef.description: A gestral planter. Tends growing things.

RimHeroes.GestralJobDef.label: salve
RimHeroes.GestralJobDef.description: A gestral tender. Fusses over wounds and the wounded.

RimHeroes.GestralJobDef.label: scrapper
RimHeroes.GestralJobDef.description: A gestral melee fighter. Small, fierce, and entirely too brave.

RimHeroes.GestralJobDef.label: bulwark
RimHeroes.GestralJobDef.description: A gestral tank. A walking shield with opinions.

RimHeroes.GestralJobDef.label: slinger
RimHeroes.GestralJobDef.description: A gestral ranged fighter. Never misses twice.

RimHeroes.GestralJobDef.label: wisp
RimHeroes.GestralJobDef.description: A gestral spellcaster. Crackles faintly when excited.
